## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential partnership between Braze and GrowthX for content creation and SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive end-to-end content creation services, including strategy, writing, image creation, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Braze is seeing success in keyword rankings but struggling to connect that to meaningful pipeline increases](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes a strategy sprint phase ($20K for 8 weeks) followed by ongoing execution ($12-15K/month for \~10 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Key differentiators: AI-powered content creation, programmatic opportunities, and ability to move quickly at scale](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Challenges at Braze

  - [Seeing success in keyword rankings (60% of target keywords, moving to positions 1-3)](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Struggling to connect rankings to meaningful pipeline increases](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Content production scaled from 2-3 pieces/month to 10+/month since March](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Challenges in balancing traffic-generating vs. conversion-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Capabilities

  - [End-to-end service: strategy, content creation, images, publishing](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
  - [AI-powered content creation with human oversight for quality](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=2475.0)
  - [Programmatic content opportunities (e.g., industry-specific variants)](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Ability to scale quickly (5-15+ articles/week, 100+ programmatic pages/week)](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=2264.0)
  - [Focus on creating engaging, conversion-focused content experiences](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=2861.0)

### Content Measurement and Attribution

  - [Discussed challenges of measuring impact in evolving search landscape (LLMs, brand citations)](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Suggested looking at incremental effects across channels (direct, brand search)](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Proposed focusing on next logical conversion steps as interim metrics](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

### Potential Quick Wins for Braze

  - [Expanding glossary content into individual, enriched pages](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Repurposing existing webinar/video content into rich articles](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Creating programmatic content variants (e.g., industry-specific pages)](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)

### GrowthX Engagement Model

  - [8-week strategy sprint ($20K) to refine approach and create initial content](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Ongoing execution phase ($12-15K/month) for scaled content production](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=3028.0)
  - [Collaborative process using tools like Slack, Notion, and Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=2254.0)
  - [Flexible review processes to accommodate legal/SME approvals](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=2554.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share detailed proposal and pricing information](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=2889.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide customer references in the SaaS industry](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=2980.0)
  - [Braze to review proposal and consider next steps for potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=2919.0)
  - [Follow up on any outstanding questions (Kyle on vacation week after next)](https://fathom.video/share/SPDzRU5MzMwDX7M_EeRHusVowHTQnz4t?tab=summary&timestamp=3141.0)
